title: Croatian Broad Bean Gratin
description: A hearty, creamy gratin made with broad beans and a crispy crust. Perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté the sliced broad beans in butter until tender.
In a separate saucepan, melt the molten cheese over low heat until smooth.
Add the heavy cream to the cheese sauce and stir until well combined.
Stir in the flour to thicken the sauce.
Add the cooked pasta to the cheese sauce and stir until coated.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish.
Top with additional molten cheese and breadcrumbs if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
